chat_mode_study_enforced_by_org_title: Study Mode is enforced by your organization
chat_mode_study_requires_thread_title: Send your first message to create a thread, then you can toggle Study Mode.
chat_prompt_attachment_upload_failed_ari: Upload failed for {fileName}. Click to remove.
chat_sidebar_description: Chat with your data and get answers to your questions with AI.
chat_sidebar_status_error_description: Something went wrong and the response could not be generated.
chat_sidebar_status_generating_descripti: The AI has started generating the response.
chat_sidebar_status_pending_description: This chat is queued; a response will be generated shortly.
chat_welcome_subtitle: What do you want to do today?
chat_welcome_suggestion_1_prompt: How can I improve my memory to remember better?
chat_welcome_suggestion_2_prompt: Teach me how to structure my prompts better to get better results
chat_welcome_suggestion_3_prompt: How can I analyze the information I read more effectively?
chat_welcome_suggestion_4_prompt: Help me create an effective study plan
chat_welcome_suggestion_5_prompt: How can I develop my creativity for projects?
chat_welcome_suggestion_6_prompt: What habits help me become a better student?
debug_auth_full_url_saved_browser_only: Full URL is saved in your browser only.
debug_auth_label_description: Optional label stored in localStorage. Useful for testing the settings form component.
debug_auth_page_description: Session and user info for development and troubleshooting.
debug_auth_select_description: Example of a form that uses the Select component. Value is saved in localStorage.
debug_auth_toggle_demo_description: Example of a form card with only a toggle section (Add-Ons style): left-aligned text, optional pricing, toggle on the right.
debug_auth_toggle_demo_help: Toggles are for demo only; state is not persisted.
debug_auth_toggle_observability_plus_des: Gain comprehensive visibility into your application's health and performance.
debug_auth_toggle_speed_insights_descrip: Detailed view of your website's performance metrics, facilitating informed decisions for its optimization.
debug_auth_value_saved_browser_only: Value is saved in your browser only.
debug_auth_website_description: Example of a form field with a fixed prefix. The full URL (prefix + value) is saved in localStorage.
insight_page_description: Analytics and insights for your projects.
org_byok_api_key_help_prefix: You can get your {providerName} API key
org_byok_feature_disabled_help: This feature is currently disabled. Contact your administrator to enable it.
org_byok_page_description: Manage your organization's API keys for AI providers (Bring Your Own Key). Keys are stored securely in WorkOS Vault.
org_byok_provider_configured_description: Configured, new requests for this provider will use your org key.
org_byok_provider_not_configured_descrip: Not configured, requests will continue using RIFT's provider key.
org_compliance_flag_enforce_study_mode_d: Force all organization chat requests to run in Study Mode and lock the mode toggle.
org_compliance_flag_require_org_provider: Only allow models from providers that have an active org API key configured.
org_compliance_flag_require_zdr_descript: Only allow models that do not retain training data.
org_compliance_flags_description: Organization-level compliance toggles. Denied catalog models are not available for use.
org_compliance_flags_help: Changes apply immediately. Toggling off a flag re-allows previously denied models.
org_compliance_page_description: Configure organization-level compliance flags and policies.
org_model_controls_description: Override model availability per model. Disabled by provider or compliance policy is shown in the description.
org_model_controls_help: Changes apply immediately. You can override a provider-level denial per model here.
org_models_page_description: Manage providers and models for your organization.
org_provider_controls_description: Enable or disable AI providers for your organization.
org_provider_controls_help: Changes apply immediately. Disabled providers and their models are unavailable to the organization.
org_provider_models_description: Enable or disable models for this provider in your organization.
org_provider_models_help: Changes apply immediately. Disabled models are unavailable to the organization.
org_provider_models_none_available: No models available for this provider.
org_provider_policy_page_description: Configure provider and model restrictions and compliance flags for your organization.
org_route_select_org_body: Select an organization in the sidebar or switch context to manage policies.
org_route_select_org_compliance_descript: Switch to an organization to manage organization-level compliance policies.
org_route_select_org_provider_models_des: Switch to an organization to manage organization-level provider and model policies.
settings_account_avatar_description: This is your avatar. Click on the avatar to upload a custom image.
settings_account_avatar_help: An avatar is optional but strongly recommended.
settings_account_email_change_requested: Email change request submitted. Check your inbox to finish verification.
settings_account_email_description: This is your account email address.
settings_account_email_help: Use a valid address you can access to complete secure verification.
settings_account_error_email_same: Please enter a different email address.
settings_account_error_sign_in_required_: You need to sign in to update your avatar.
You need to sign in to update your profile.
settings_account_language_description: בחרו את שפת הממשק המועדפת עליכם.
settings_account_language_help: אפשר לשנות זאת בכל זמן. בעתיד אפשר להשתמש ב-URLs ייעודיים לשפה עבור דפי שיווק.
settings_account_name_description: Please enter your full name, or a display name you are comfortable with.
settings_account_page_description: Manage your account details and avatar.
settings_avatar_upload_invalid_type: Please upload a JPG, PNG, WEBP, or SVG image.
